Job Description:

Summary
The UI / UX Designer will be responsible for conceptualizing, designing, prototyping and delivering compelling and intuitive experiences for our customer facing web and mobile applications, including ecommerce websites and customer-facing administrative platforms. Working closely with the product teams and digital analysts, the individual will translate ideas into customer experiences, flows, wireframes and mockups using modern UX/UI best practices and emerging AI-informed design approaches. He or she will also help develop strategies around conducting usability tests and integrating findings into the final output.

Essential Functions
Translate product strategy and user requirements into full-fledged user experiences, creating pixel perfect mockups, user flow diagrams, and interactive prototypes to convey complex interactions.
Understand and interpret brand, user and business needs, in order to develop innovative, creative and results-oriented digital solutions across ecommerce and customer-facing admin experiences
Conduct competitive research and analytic rigor in designing our user experiences
Optimize existing user interface designs and test new ideas before implementing
Working with engineers to construct dynamic, interactive designs that are technically feasible
Create journey maps, user profiles, user cases/scenarios, and personas that are aligned with project and business goals
Communicate and ardently defend good user experience design to stakeholders

Additional Responsibilities
Performs other duties as assigned.

Skills and Abilities
Expert-level proficiency in Figma (our exclusive design tool), including component libraries,
